single_source_of_truth: paper/base.md §6.5(e) + L495/L502 hidden-DOF audit + L491–L494/L498/L503/L506–L509 cross-channel
enum_extension_note_L516: L495 hidden-DOF audit (k_hidden = 9 conservative ~ 13 expanded) + L502 AICc penalty quantification together force a re-grading: every previously-substantive PASS_STRONG row carries 1–2 applicable hidden DOF (B1 ansatz, η_Z₂ scale, Λ_UV stipulation, dark-only embedding, M16 functional, Υ⋆ convention). Per L502 Table §2 with k_h_applicable, ΔAICc(SQT − free) lands in [+2, +5] for all four substantive rows + L482 RAR + Bullet — i.e. *no* claim survives an honest AICc test at PASS_STRONG. Three new grades introduced: PASS_MODERATE (ΔAICc ∈ [+2, +6] with applicable hidden DOF, still passes the bare bound), PASS_QUALITATIVE (Bullet-class qualitative-only PASS, magnitude not derivable), OPEN_PROVISIONAL (channel-specific PASS that fails one or more cross-channel audits — e.g. L503 universality FAIL, L506 channel 3 universal_phase3 FAIL).
